parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[include_deleted]
parameters.description: Use 'only' to return only deleted resources. Use 'with' to return deleted and undeleted resources.

origin_type.description: type of object this change event originated from

display_name.description: name of event origin used for view

origin_id.description: The Origin ID of the Change Event

origin_data.description: The Origin Data of the Change Event

login.description: email address of Change Event creator

name.description: first and last name of Change Event creator

notes.description: The failures of independent actions will be aggregated under the attribute and will not result in a Failure. For example: sync WBS code.

source.description: The Change Event source refers to the resource that was responsible for creating this Change Event.

403.description: User does not have permission access to view Change Events.

budget_change.description: Return Change Events with or without Change Items with the specified Budget Change

budget_days_in_stage.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified budget days in stage

budget_stage_status.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Budget Stage with the specified status

budget_stage.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Budget Stage with the specified stage

budget_code.description: Return Change Events  with or without Change Items with the specified Budget Code

change_reason.description: Return Change Events with the specified Change Reason, or Change Events that do not have the specified Change Reason, based on the operator used

change_type.description: Return Change Events with the specified Change Type, or Change Events that do not have the specified Change Type, based on the operator used.

commitment_status.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Commitment Contract or Commitment Change Order with the specified status

commitment.description: Return Change Events with or without Change Items associated with a Commitment or Commitment Change Orders

custom_field_id.description: Return Change Events with custom fields that match the specified custom field values

created_at.description:
Change Events created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
- `N_months` - Within N month,
- `N_days` - Within N days,
- `YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date,
- `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ...

cost_in_status_since.description:
Change Events with Change Items having cost entered status within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
- `N_months` - Within N month,
- `N_days` - Within N days,
- `YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-M...

revenue_in_status_since.description:
Change Events with Change Items having revenue entered status within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
- `N_months` - Within N month,
- `N_days` - Within N days,
- `YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYY...

budget_in_status_since.description:
Change Events with Change Items having budget entered status within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
- `N_months` - Within N month,
- `N_days` - Within N days,
- `YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY...

created_by.description: Return Change Events created by the specified User

commitment_title.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Commitment or Commitment Change Orders with the specified title

contract.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Commitment or Commitment Change Orders with the specified Contract

cost_days_in_stage.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified cost days in stage

cost_rom_amount.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified cost rom amount

latest_cost_amount_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified latest cost amount in project currency

latest_revenue_amount_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified latest revenue amount in project currency

latest_budget_impact_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified latest budget impact in project currency

revenue_unit_cost_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified revenue unit cost in project currency

budget_unit_cost_value_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified budget unit cost in project currency

cost_unit_cost_value_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified cost unit cost in project currency

over_under_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified over/under amount in project currency (revenue - cost)

latest_quote_amount_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified request for quote amount in project currency

cost_stage_status.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Cost Stage with the specified status

cost_stage.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Cost Stage with the specified stage

event_origin_type.description: Return Change Events with or without the assigned Origin with specified Origin Type.

item_type.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified Item Type

non_commitment.description: Return Change Events with or without Change Items with Non Commitment Cost

number.description: Return Change Events with or without the specified Change Event ID

number_title.description: Return Change Events with or without the specified Change Event ID

prime_pco_status.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Prime Change Order with the specified status

prime_pco.description: Return Change Events with or without Change Items associated with Prime PCO

revenue_days_in_stage.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified revenue days in stage

revenue_rom_amount_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified revenue rom amount in project currency

budget_rom_amount_project_currency.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having the specified budget rom amount in project currency

rfq.description: Return Change Events with or without Change Items having Request for Quote

rfq_status.description: Return Change Events with Change Items having Request for Quote with the specified status

rfq_title.description: Change Items having Request for Quote with title groups which are represented by the RFQ ID and Composed RFQ ID or None which is empty string

scope.description: Return Change Events with the specified event scope, or Change Events that do not have the specified event scope, based on the operator used

status.description: Return Change Events with the specified status, or Change Events that do not have the specified status, based on the operator used

vendor.description: Return Change Events with the ids of the specified Change Event Vendors

wbs_segment_id.description: Return Change Events with or without Change Items with Budget Code that has the specified WBS Segment ID
